popularStory.headline: Robert Page, III and Lucy Warde
popularStory.description:
"Robert Page and Lucy Warde were married in Saint Marys the parish church of South Walsham, Norfolk, England." 

"Robert PAGE, age 33 and Lucy, age 30 passed examination April 11, 1637 to go to New En …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Page於1604年出生在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特時，他的父親Robert Page II27歲，母親Margaret Goodwin34歲。他於1629年10月8日與Lucia Warde在英國諾福爾可素斯 瓦爾申馬 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1679年9月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆咸頓享年75歲，埋葬在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓潘恩 葛洛夫 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Page于1604年出生在英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特时，他的父亲Robert Page II27岁，母亲Margaret Goodwin34岁。他于1629年10月8日与Lucia Warde在英国諾福爾可素斯 瓦爾申馬 聖 瑪麗结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1679年9月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆咸頓享年75岁，埋葬在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆咸頓潘恩 葛洛夫 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Page
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and French: occupational or status name for a young servant, Middle English page, paige, Old French page (from Italian paggio, ultimately from Greek paidion, a diminutive of pais ‘boy, child’). The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 16th century. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the French cognate Lepage .
French Canadian (Pagé): altered form of French Paget , a diminutive of 1. Compare Pashia .
North German: metonymic occupational name for a horse dealer, from Middle Low German page ‘horse’.

variants.name: Pages
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Mario, Eduardo, Jorge, Luis, Mauricio, Ramon, Fernando, Jose, Lazaro, Pedro, Alfredo.  French Jacques, Lucien, Michel.

Catalan and southern French (Pagès): occupational name for a peasant farmer or agricultural laborer, from Catalan and Old Occitan pagès ‘peasant’ (from Late Latin pagensis, a derivative of pagus ‘village, country district’).
English: variant of Page with genitival of post-medieval excrescent s.

variants.name: Pageau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Stephane, Alphonse, Andre, Fernand, Gisele, Jean Claude, Lucien, Philippe.

variants.name: Lepage
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Andre, Fernand, Pierre, Raoul, Adelard, Alcide, Christophe, Lucien, Normand, Adrien.
French: occupational or status name for a young servant, a variant of Page 1, with fused masculine definite article le. Compare Lapage .
French Canadian: altered form of Pagé (see Page 2).

variants.name: Padgett
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire): from a Middle English diminutive of page, paige ‘servant, groom’ (see Page ).

variants.name: Littlepage
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English littel ‘small’ +Middle English, Old French page ‘young servant’ (see Page ).

variants.name: Pashia
meanings: Americanized form of French Canadian Pagé (see Page 2).
History: It was Jean Baptiste Pagé from QC whose surname was changed to Pashia after he settled in MO in the 1810s. Some of his descendants bear a rare variant, Pashea.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.
Oldest Grave seen in Memorials List

historicEvents.title: First Recorded Slave in Portsmouth
historicEvents.description: In 1645, an African American man taken from Guinea was captured and brought to New Hampshire, he would be counted as the first African American slave in New Hampshire.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Black Heritage Trail in New Hampshire- Our African Heritage

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Page was born in 1604, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, his father, Robert Page II, was 27 and his mother, Margaret Goodwin, was 34. He married Lucia Warde on 8 October 1629, in South Walsham St Mary, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 22 September 1679, in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 75, and was buried in Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Page est né en 1604, à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Page II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Goodwin, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Lucia Warde le 8 octobre 1629, à South Walsham St Mary, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 22 septembre 1679, à Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Page 1604 in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Page II 27 und seine Mutter Margaret Goodwin 34. Er hat am 8. Oktober 1629 in South Walsham St Mary, Norfolk, England Lucia Warde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 22. September 1679 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America und wurde in Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Page è nato il nel 1604 nel Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Robert Page II, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Goodwin, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Lucia Warde il 8 ottobre 1629, nel South Walsham St Mary, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 22 settembre 1679, nel Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Pageが1604年にイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットで生まれた時，父Robert Page IIは27歳，母Margaret Goodwinは34歳であった。1629年10月8日にイギリスノーフォルクソウス ワルシャム スト マリーでLucia Wardeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1679年9月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムハンプトンで75歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムハンプトンピン グローブ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Page(이)가 1604년 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Page II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Goodwin(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1629년 10월 8일 영국 노르폴크 소우스 월샤 스트 메리에서 Lucia Warde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1679년 9월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 함프턴에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴 핀 그로브 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Page nasceu em 1604, em Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Page II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Goodwin, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucia Warde em 8 de outubro de 1629, em South Walsham St Mary, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1679, em Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Page родился в 1604 г. в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Page II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Goodwin, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucia Warde 8 октября 1629 г. в местности соут валшам ст мэри, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 22 сентября 1679 г. в местности хамптон, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности паин гров кеметири, хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Page nació en 1604, en Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Page II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret Goodwin, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Lucia Warde el 8 de octubre de 1629, en South Walsham St Mary, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1679, en Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos.
